title: Gemini Omni's Best Feature
summary: Google's Gemini Omni adds objects to existing video footage based on text, image, or audio descriptions. It automatically handles lighting and shading in post-production, functioning as a real-time generative video editing tool for object insertion.
writeup: Jack Roberts examines Gemini Omni's object insertion feature, which lets users add objects into existing video footage through text, image, or audio description. The system automatically matches lighting and shading to the surrounding environment, so inserted objects fit the scene without manual compositing. Roberts frames the capability as real-time post-production for video editing, positioning it as a faster alternative to traditional editing workflows.
